zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Fox於1648年9月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德時，她的父親Thomas Fox28歲，母親Hannah Brooks23歲。她於1669年8月11日與Sergeant Daniel Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1713年2月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Fox于1648年9月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德时，她的父亲Thomas Fox28岁，母亲Hannah Brooks23岁。她于1669年8月11日与Sergeant Daniel Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1713年2月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

variants.name: Faulks
meanings: English: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Fauque, Fauques, Fau(l)ques (oblique case Fau(l)que), originally an ancient Germanic byname Falco, meaning ‘falcon’.

variants.name: Foxman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Charna, Isadore, Shmuel.

variants.name: Fuchs
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Gerhard, Fritz, Mathias, Matthias, Armin, Ulrich, Erwin, Helmut.

German and Jewish: from Middle High German vuhs, German Fuchs ‘fox’, a nickname for a sly or cunning person, or for someone with red hair. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. Compare Fox 4, Fuks , and Futch .

variants.name: Kearney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus, Caitlin, Declan, Dermot, Donovan, Eamonn, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Catharnaigh ‘descendant of Catharnach’, a personal name meaning ‘warlike’. Alternatively, it may be from Ó Cearnaigh or Mac Cearnaigh (from cearnach ‘victorious’) or from Ó Ceithearnaigh ‘descendant of Ceithearnach’, a personal name meaning ‘foot soldier’.

History: Most present-day bearers of this name are descended from Tadhg Ó Catharnaigh, killed in battle in 1084. He was nicknamed An Sionnach ‘the Fox’, and for this reason the Irish surname was sometimes Anglicized as Fox . Denis Kearney, born in Oakmont, Ireland, in 1847, was a US labor movement leader.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Fox was born on 25 September 1648, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Fox, was 28 and her mother, Hannah Brooks, was 23. She married Sergeant Daniel Lester on 11 August 1669, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 February 1713, in New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Fox est née le 25 septembre 1648, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Fox, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hannah Brooks, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sergeant Daniel Lester le 11 août 1669, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 février 1713, à New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Fox am 25. September 1648 in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fox 28 und ihre Mutter Hannah Brooks 23. Sie hat am 11. August 1669 in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sergeant Daniel Lester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Februar 1713 im Alter von 64 Jahren in New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Fox è nata il il 25 settembre 1648 nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Fox, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Hannah Brooks, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sergeant Daniel Lester il 11 agosto 1669, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1713, nel New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.New London, New London, Connecticut Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドン
ja.New London, New London, Connecticut, Uni: アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Foxが1648年9月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで生まれた時，父Thomas Foxは28歳，母Hannah Brooksは23歳であった。1669年8月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンでSergeant Daniel Lesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1713年2月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンで64歳で死去した。

ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드

ko.Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴
ko.New London, Connecticut Colony, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던
ko.New London, New London, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던
ko.New London, New London, Connecticut, Uni: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Fox(이)가 1648년 9월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fox(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Brooks(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1669년 8월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 Sergeant Daniel Lester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1713년 2월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Fox nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1648, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Fox, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Brooks, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sergeant Daniel Lester em 11 de agosto de 1669, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1713, em New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Fox родилась 25 сентября 1648 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Fox было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Brooks, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sergeant Daniel Lester 11 августа 1669 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 февраля 1713 г. в местности ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Fox nació el 25 de septiembre de 1648, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Fox, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Hannah Brooks, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sergeant Daniel Lester el 11 de agosto de 1669, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1713, en New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años.
